title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IKEA India is Hiring: Floor Manager (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
We at IKEA India are looking for an experienced Floor Manager based out of Vadodara. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About IKEA India:
IKEA India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in POS Systems

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IKEA India!
